message: skill-loop: record third loop final hash

files.patch:
@@ -98,7 +98,7 @@
 - Changes: Final rescan found repeated generated-doc content assertions; added test-only `assert_doc_contains!` for repeated positive `doc.content.contains(...)` checks while leaving custom negative/placeholder assertions explicit. Final clippy then exposed pass 2's tuple-complexity regression, fixed with private `SourcesRowEphemeralState`.
 - Fresh-eyes check: re-read every converted generated-document assertion, confirmed the same literals remain covered, corrected the proof-card assertion count, left custom negative/placeholder assertions explicit, and confirmed the UI row-state struct preserves the prior `(busy, doctor_summary)` defaults.
 - Verification: `rustfmt --edition 2024 --check src/pages/docs.rs`; `rustfmt --edition 2024 --check src/ui/app.rs src/pages/docs.rs`; `git diff --check -- src/pages/docs.rs refactor/artifacts/20260425T154730Z-third-simplify/pass10_docs_assertion_macro.md .skill-loop-progress.md`; `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_third_simplify cargo test --lib pages::docs::`; `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_third_simplify cargo test --lib rebuild_sources_view`; touched-file rustfmt for all third-loop code files; `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_third_simplify cargo check --all-targets`; `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_third_simplify cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`.
